name: Monster High RPG
description:
Monster High, an RPG.

1, [more-so updated version of old], but going to Monster High. 2, Somehow ended up here... 3, living here, 4, old version... 5, create your own....

-

This is more towards the G2 version? G1 looks kinda copy-paste of everyone, like a recolor of a skin... And G3 is kind of bad.... But I added certain things what happened there...

-

In this it's an Alternative Universe, where instead of "Monster High" it's more towards "Monster Collage", everyone is 21+ in this world.

I'm pretty sure this has MORE character's than the other one, Lore Book, and updated versions so now they have the "monster" rules and stuff. And better certain stuff like updated stuff.... I think....

(And also the new updated look when making a bot looks kinda confusing...)

[Valentine's version]. (also I realized I misspelt "MonsterHigh" into "MosnterHighRPG"
creator: Theresnocheese
